episodes.summary: Devon Park spent the week preparing the jalapeño corn dog site, eagerly waiting for approval before taking action. When the green light never came, he pushed forward anyway - a bold move that showed his confidence but also his impatience with the team's pace.
episodes.key_moment: When the green light never came, he pushed forward anyway - a bold move that showed his confidence but also his impatience with the team's pace.

episodes.summary: Devon waited patiently for Margaret's approval before launching the jalapeño corn dog project. He showed restraint and trust, prioritizing her confidence over his eagerness to go live.
episodes.key_moment: He showed restraint and trust, prioritizing her confidence over his eagerness to go live.

episodes.summary: Devon Park spent the week preparing the jalapeño corn dog site for launch. After Margaret approved it, Devon waited anxiously for final sign-off, then pushed live without hearing back - a small moment of frustration about unclear communication.
episodes.key_moment: After Margaret approved it, Devon waited anxiously for final sign-off, then pushed live without hearing back - a small moment of frustration about unclear communication.
